title: Jack Chapple
html:
Stub. Jack Chapple — YouTuber Yahir cited in his April-7-2020 lockdown monologue (2020 04 07 what a strange time indeed) for the WW2-aftermath / "old goliaths crumble, new winners emerge" historical-economics frame. One of the cluster — public intellectuals Yahir absorbed during the pandemic era who shaped his macro-thesis voice.

First mention: April 2020. If a 2nd mention surfaces (likely in the post pandemic future thinking cluster of 2020-2021 notes), promote.

related.label: What a strange time indeed — early-COVID monologue from Dad's living room
